description_long: This is a modern cash register with a rectangular, robust body primarily finished in dark gray. The front features a large keyboard with both alphanumeric and function keys, a numeric keypad, and a colorful set of programmable buttons. Above the keyboard is a customer-facing digital display screen showing transaction information in green text. The lower section contains a lockable cash drawer, and a receipt printer slot is visible on the upper left. The surface is mostly matte with some subtle scuff marks, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for retail or urban commercial environments.
description: A dark gray, modern cash register with a large keyboard, digital display, cash drawer, and receipt printer slot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped keyboard, display screen, and the receipt printer slot on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full keyboard, colorful function keys, digital display, and the lockable cash drawer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the keyboard, display, and function keys visible, but the receipt printer slot is less prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the display and the solid, featureless rear panel.
attribute_keypad_layout: Full QWERTY keyboard with numeric keypad and a grid of 12 colorful function keys
